name: Asiasoft Corp. PCL Reg. Shares
summary: Asiasoft Corporation PCL is a regional online entertainment service provider based in Thailand, offering a variety of online games and related services to users in Southeast Asia. The company's business model focuses on game publishing, operation, and distribution, catering to a diverse range of gamers with different preferences. Asiasoft is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand and operates in several countries in the region.
